monitor.capture_what: The first argument passed to eval() — the tainted string derived from user-controlled cookie data

oracle_check.condition_description: The argument passed to eval() contains dangerous Python expressions indicating code injection — specifically patterns like __import__, __builtins__, os.system, subprocess, or other code execution primitives that bypass the weak quote validation
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY/CODE-INJECTION: eval() received tainted payload with dangerous code injection pattern — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}
